message.content:
please provide your API keys for the following services:
Twilio (Required for making calls):
Get your credentials from https://console.twilio.com
You'll need Account SID, Auth Token, and a phone number
AI Services (Required for transcription and LLM ):
Groq (Recommended for transcription): https://console.groq.com
Cerebras (For LLM ): https://cloud.cerebras.ai
Deepgram (Alternative for transcription ): https://console.deepgram.com

# ================================================
# EXODUS AI VOICE CALLER - ENVIRONMENT CONFIGURATION
# ================================================

# Server Configuration
NODE_ENV=production
BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000
API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000
WEBHOOK_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000/webhooks

# ================================================
# TWILIO CONFIGURATION
# ================================================
TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID=AC39ed37a2d9e427ea7aeb4c27aa368110
TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN=3590e08c47cfbb31093592ec84ab4af0

# Primary Phone Numbers
TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER=+19544668818
TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER_2=+15617826702
TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER_3=+19543353601

# All phone numbers (comma-separated)
TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBERS=+19544668818,+15617826702,+19543353601

# Webhook URLs for Twilio (using localtunnel)
TWILIO_WEBHOOK_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks/twilio
TWILIO_VOICE_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks/twilio/voice
TWILIO_MEDIA_STREAMS_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks/twilio/media-streams
TWILIO_STATUS_CALLBACK_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks/twilio/status
TWILIO_FALLBACK_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks/twilio/fallback
TWILIO_GATHER_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks/twilio/gather
TWILIO_RECORDING_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks/twilio/recording
TWILIO_AMD_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks/twilio/amd

# Twilio Settings
TWILIO_RECORD_CALLS=false
TWILIO_MACHINE_DETECTION=Enable
TWILIO_ASYNC_AMD=true
TWILIO_TIMEOUT=60
TWILIO_CALL_STATUS_EVENTS=initiated,ringing,answered,completed

# ================================================
# AI CONFIGURATION (GROQ & CEREBRAS)
# ================================================
GROQ_API_KEY=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
GROQ_MODEL=llama-3.1-8b-instant
GROQ_TEMPERATURE=0.7
GROQ_MAX_TOKENS=500
GROQ_TOP_P=0.9
GROQ_STREAM=false

# Cerebras Cloud (Ultra-fast inference)
CEREBRAS_API_KEY=csk-45rkpchch265v85mj2e85pdtyj3pm8nmdyh85wyk82pprcc3
CEREBRAS_MODEL=llama3.1-8b
CEREBRAS_TEMPERATURE=0.7
CEREBRAS_MAX_TOKENS=500

# AI System Prompts
AI_SYSTEM_PROMPT="You are a professional AI assistant making phone calls. Be polite, clear, and concise. Speak naturally as if in a real phone conversation."
AI_GREETING_PROMPT="Generate a friendly, professional greeting for a phone call"
AI_FALLBACK_RESPONSE="I apologize, I didn't catch that. Could you please repeat?"

# ================================================
# TEXT-TO-SPEECH (TTS) CONFIGURATION
# ================================================
TTS_PROVIDER=edge-tts
DEFAULT_VOICE=en-US-AvaMultilingualNeural
DEFAULT_VOICE_RATE=1.2
DEFAULT_VOICE_PITCH=1.0
DEFAULT_VOICE_VOLUME=1.0

# Voice Options
VOICE_FEMALE_US=en-US-AvaMultilingualNeural
VOICE_MALE_US=en-US-ChristopherNeural
VOICE_FEMALE_UK=en-GB-SoniaNeural
VOICE_MALE_UK=en-GB-RyanNeural

# ================================================
# DATABASE CONFIGURATION
# ================================================
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/exodus_voice_caller
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379
REDIS_PREFIX=exodus:

# Database Pool Settings
DB_POOL_MIN=2
DB_POOL_MAX=10
DB_IDLE_TIMEOUT=10000

# ================================================
# SECURITY & AUTHENTICATION
# ================================================
JWT_SECRET=exodus-secret-key-change-in-production-xyz789
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d
REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET=exodus-refresh-secret-abc123
REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN=30d

# API Keys
API_KEY=exodus-api-key-2024
ADMIN_API_KEY=exodus-admin-key-secure-2024

# CORS Settings
CORS_ORIGIN=*
CORS_CREDENTIALS=true

# Rate Limiting
RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS=60000
RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS=100

# ================================================
# LOGGING & MONITORING
# ================================================
LOG_LEVEL=info
LOG_FORMAT=json
LOG_DIR=./logs
LOG_MAX_SIZE=10m
LOG_MAX_FILES=14d
LOG_COMPRESS=true

# Error Tracking
SENTRY_DSN=
ERROR_WEBHOOK_URL=

# ================================================
# WEBSOCKET CONFIGURATION
# ================================================
WS_PORT=8000
WS_PATH=/ws
WS_PING_INTERVAL=30000
WS_PING_TIMEOUT=5000
TWILIO_WEBSOCKET_URL=wss://plenty-bears-crash.loca.lt/media-stream

# ================================================
# CAMPAIGN SETTINGS
# ================================================
MAX_CONCURRENT_CALLS=10
CALL_RETRY_ATTEMPTS=3
CALL_RETRY_DELAY=300000
CAMPAIGN_BATCH_SIZE=50
CAMPAIGN_DELAY_BETWEEN_CALLS=2000

# ================================================
# AUDIO SETTINGS
# ================================================
AUDIO_CACHE_DIR=./audio-cache
AUDIO_FORMAT=wav
AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE=8000
AUDIO_CHANNELS=1
AUDIO_BIT_DEPTH=16

# ================================================
# FEATURE FLAGS
# ================================================
ENABLE_CALL_RECORDING=true
ENABLE_TRANSCRIPTION=false
ENABLE_SENTIMENT_ANALYSIS=true
ENABLE_CALL_ANALYTICS=true
ENABLE_WEBHOOKS=true
ENABLE_SMS_NOTIFICATIONS=false

# ================================================
# EXTERNAL WEBHOOKS
# ================================================
WEBHOOK_CALL_START=
WEBHOOK_CALL_END=
WEBHOOK_CALL_ERROR=
WEBHOOK_CAMPAIGN_COMPLETE=

# ================================================
# PERFORMANCE TUNING
# ================================================
NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096
UV_THREADPOOL_SIZE=128
CLUSTER_WORKERS=1

# ================================================
# DEVELOPMENT/DEBUG
# ================================================
DEBUG=false
VERBOSE_LOGGING=false
MOCK_CALLS=true
TEST_MODE=false
DISABLE_RATE_LIMITS=false

# ================================================
# BACKUP & RECOVERY
# ================================================
BACKUP_ENABLED=false
BACKUP_SCHEDULE="0 2 * * *"
BACKUP_RETENTION_DAYS=30
BACKUP_S3_BUCKET=
BACKUP_S3_REGION=

# ================================================
# NOTES
# ================================================
# Created: 2024-08-24
# Version: 2.0.0
# System: EXODUS AI Voice Caller
# 
# IMPORTANT: 
# - Change JWT secrets in production
# - Use HTTPS URLs for production webhooks
# - Enable Twilio webhook signature validation
# - Set appropriate rate limits
# - Configure proper CORS origins
# ================================================
# ================================================
# NEW FEATURES - ADDITIONAL API KEYS
# ================================================

# Daily.co WebRTC Testing
DAILY_API_KEY=3ddb707e8d513fff5165f8677126881de61dbfc0c87ecb3957790709a27e0d20
DAILY_API_URL=https://api.daily.co/v1

# Local Whisper for WebRTC STT (using your existing Whisper setup)

# Python Microservices Environment
PYTHONPATH=/home/ubuntu/Desktop/exodus-kali-deploy
KOKORO_ENV_PATH=/home/ubuntu/Desktop/exodus-kali-deploy/kokorro tts/comfyui_env/bin/python
WHISPER_MODEL=base
MEM0_API_KEY=your-mem0-api-key-here

# ================================================
# SHARED WEBRTC STREAM CONFIGURATION
# ================================================
SHARED_SIP_ENDPOINT=sip:shared-exodus-room.0@daily-e7492ca0a3e72913-app.dapp.signalwire.com
DAILY_ROOM_URL=https://cloud-3fbaa1d6eb0e4e16864bc5160064535e.daily.co/shared-exodus-room

# Update server port for consistency
PORT=3001
BASE_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt
API_BASE_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt
WEBHOOK_BASE_URL=https://loose-shirts-check.loca.lt/webhooks

# Twilio webhooks already configured above with Cloudflare tunnel URLs


# DeepSeek API Configuration
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=sk-06938b7a6fe44776b6735e5703700850

# Deepgram API Configuration (for STT/TTS testing)
# Sign up for free tier at: https://deepgram.com
DEEPGRAM_API_KEY=44f464f1116d54ee9412f7b9214cdde028240091

# STT Provider (deepgram or groq)
STT_PROVIDER=deepgram
